emails.subject: Re: Teco's Indian Spring Plant
emails.body: Re: Teco's Indian Spring Plant I have created the following operational tickets to cover the Big Sandy UA4 and fuel (1/99-12/00): Receipt 475647 Delivery 475648 Settlements with Teco should be booked to the existing deals: HPL Purchase #87292 10/98-12/99 #137870 1/00-12/00 HPL Slae #94441 8/99 #235670 9/99-12/00 Let me know if you have any questions. D Mary Poorman@ENRON 11/08/2000 04:21 PM
